headline: The Nex Playground is down to its pre-RAMageddon price during Prime Day
summary: Nex Playground, a Kinect-like family game console, is praised by parents and kids. It offers motion-based gameplay, creating engaging experiences. Currently on sale for $239 at Amazon during Prime Day.

headline: Google Home will soon get better at recognizing you
summary: Google Home is getting an update for improved facial recognition. Smart home cameras will better identify users, even when facing away. The "Familiar Faces" feature will be expanded starting June 23rd.

headline: Hollywood is bending the knee to OpenAI
summary: Major studios like Netflix and A24 are reportedly declining a film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. Luca Guadagnino's biographical drama "Artificial" struggles for distribution. This signals Hollywood's hesitance with projects related to OpenAI and Sam Altman.

headline: Prime Day takes $240 off Roborock’s Saros 20, one of our favorite robovacs
summary: The Roborock Saros 20, a top-rated robot vacuum and mop, is on sale. It's praised for its autonomous cleaning capabilities. Get $240 off during Prime Day, priced at $1,359.99 on Amazon and Roborock.

headline: Save $85 Off a Pair of BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Amazon Prime Day offers a discount on BowFlex SelectTech Dumbbells. Save $85 on a pair of the popular adjustable weights. An excellent deal for fitness enthusiasts during the sale event.

headline: Marathon Confirms New PvE Mode Release Date, Season 3 Begins September 2026
summary: Marathon announces the release date for its new PvE mode. The upcoming mode is titled "Vault Breaker." Season 3 of Marathon is scheduled to begin in September 2026.

headline: The 65" LG Evo C5 4K OLED Smart TV Drops to the Lowest Price of the Year for Amazon Prime Day
summary: The 65" LG Evo C5 4K OLED Smart TV is at its lowest price ever for Prime Day. It's hailed as a top choice for both gaming and movie enthusiasts. Experience stunning 4K resolution with HDR quality.

headline: Amazon Has Surprisingly Good 4K and Blu-ray Deals for Prime Day
summary: Amazon Prime Day features unexpected deals on 4K and Blu-ray movies. It's a prime opportunity to expand your physical media collection. Discover great discounts on TV shows and films during the sale.

headline: Hundreds of schools plan closures ahead of red heat alerts
summary: Hundreds of schools are planning closures due to impending red heat alerts. Temperatures have already soared, reaching 34.6 C in Wisley, England. Scotland and Northern Ireland experienced their warmest days of the year.

headline: From cool-down spots to chalk on windows - how Europe is coping with the heat
summary: Europeans are implementing various strategies to combat the intense heatwave. Measures range from setting up public cool-down spots to unconventional methods. The continent is grappling with soaring temperatures, prompting widespread coping mechanisms.

headline: Starmer holds talks with Burnham as he seeks 'orderly' transition
summary: Keir Starmer is in talks with Andy Burnham regarding a smooth transition. The outgoing Prime Minister is facilitating "access talks" with the civil service. Discussions are aimed at Labour leadership candidates for an orderly handover.

headline: Germany rail network comes to complete halt nationwide due to IT malfunction
summary: Germany's national rail network has completely halted operations. The disruption is due to a nationwide IT malfunction affecting Deutsche Bahn. Train services across the entire country are currently paused.
